## Checklist

- [ ] Matches brand voice (see docs/BRAND_VOICE.md)
- [ ] No repeated topics from last 2 weeks
- [ ] CTA included
- [ ] Hashtags reviewed
- [ ] Factually accurate

## Decision

- [ ] **APPROVED** — Move to `context/approvals/`
- [ ] **NEEDS REVISION** — See comments below
- [ ] **REJECTED** — Reason:
